must_look_like: goose egg or small oval face with soft chin
black medium-long straight hair or low ponytail
subdued everyday clothing in low-saturation colors like gray, off-white, pale pink
tense shoulders and neck, restrained standing posture with defensive hand tightening
alert avoiding gaze, natural lip color, minimal makeup
round or small goose egg face with childish cheeks
black short student hair, shoulder-length or low ponytail, simple style
plain student uniform in navy, white, light gray, cotton/knit
slim small build, narrow shoulders, anxious contracted sitting/standing posture
clear eyes with unease, no makeup, immature features
elongated face with narrow jaw, clean lines
short black hair, neatly combed back or natural side part
dark suit in charcoal black or deep gray, white shirt, low-key tie, matte wool texture
slim upright build, straight shoulders and back, restrained movements
mild eyes with scrutinizing gaze, minimal expressions, clear nose bridge
must_not_look_like: long ponytail or student short hair

rules: MISAKI_FEMALE has softer oval face vs SAKURA_CHILD's rounder childish face
MISAKI_FEMALE appears more mature in 20s with tense adult posture vs SAKURA_CHILD's teen unease and contraction
MISAKI_FEMALE has medium-long straight hair vs SAKURA_CHILD's shorter simple student hair
MISAKI_FEMALE in subdued casual wear vs SAKURA_CHILD in plain student uniform
MISAKI_FEMALE has slightly broader shoulders with restraint vs SAKURA_CHILD's narrow slim shoulders
MISAKI_FEMALE has soft feminine oval face vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE's elongated masculine narrow jaw
MISAKI_FEMALE younger 20s alert tension vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE mature 30s calm upright posture
MISAKI_FEMALE medium-long hair vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE short combed hair
MISAKI_FEMALE subdued casual vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE dark professional suit
MISAKI_FEMALE tense narrow shoulders vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE straight broader professional shoulders
SAKURA_CHILD round childish face vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE elongated adult face
SAKURA_CHILD teen slim contracted posture vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE 30s upright restrained build
SAKURA_CHILD short simple hair vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE short neat combed hair
SAKURA_CHILD plain student uniform vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE dark suit with tie
SAKURA_CHILD narrow anxious shoulders vs ISHIKAWA_DETECTIVE straight mature shoulders
